suggestions.title: Practice a few wand movements
suggestions.description: Professor Flitwick left a short charm drill on the notice board after class.

suggestions.title: Visit the Owlery before rain
suggestions.description: The sky looks unsettled, and the owls are being sent out earlier than usual.

suggestions.title: Walk by Hagrid's hut
suggestions.description: There is a new crate near the pumpkins, and students are already guessing what creature arrived.

tasks.title: Finish the Herbology essay
tasks.description: Complete the two-roll essay on magical water plants and include Professor Sprout's notes before tomorrow morning's class.

tasks.title: Review Transfiguration notes
tasks.description: Read over the lesson on switching spells and mark the passages Professor McGonagall said would return in the next practical exercise.

tasks.title: Return the Charms textbook
tasks.description: Take your borrowed copy back to the library before supper, and make sure the lending slip is signed at Madam Pince's desk.

tasks.title: Prepare Potions ingredients
tasks.description: Set aside moonstone powder, dried nettles, and a clean vial for tomorrow's draught assignment in the dungeon classroom.
